segments.text: Yeah, even mid-combo somehow their stock can still get taken!
segments.original_text: いやコンボ中でもなぜか自分の命が刈り取られる可能性があるっていうね

segments.text: Yeah, we've been seeing that all match
segments.original_text: さっきからそれがね見受けられるんで

full_text: Yeah, even mid-combo somehow their stock can still get taken! Yeah, we've been seeing that all match There it is!
